CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-29-2025 Set For Order To Show Cause On Dec-02-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-13-2025 Continued To Oct-22-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-11-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT

Appearances: Gary M. Waite (415.877.0496) plaintiff and opposing party appearing in propria persona; No other appearances.

Plaintiff did not give notice of his intent to contest the tentative ruling. Discussed and the court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. Judicially noticeable facts show that on May 8, 2023, Plaintiffs signed a contract in Pro Per waiving their rights to pursue this lawsuit against Defendant under California Civil Code Section 1542. In its late-filed Opposition, Plaintiff's only argument pertaining to this waiver is that other lawsuits are ongoing, with no explanation as to what these lawsuits are or how their pendency affects the validity Plaintiffs' waiver that occurred on May 8, 2023. To the extent that Plaintiffs' Opposition claims that attorney Mr. Higginbotham's conduct affects the validity of their Section 1542 waiver, the Court notes that Plaintiff signed the waiver in Pro Per and represented that they were advised of the importance of seeking legal advice on the contract's terms. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-15-2025 Continued To Aug-11-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC's DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT.

Transferred to be heard in department 501 on August 11, 2025, at 9:30 a.m. That department handles all landlord-tenant disputes per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
